headline: 《奥德赛》领跑今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周新片仅1部。热点榜《奥德赛》《后室》等领衔，行业聚焦暑期档预热与剧集动态。
summaryEn: No new movies released today, only 1 this week. Trending titles include 'Odyssey' and 'Backrooms'; industry highlights summer pre-heat and series updates.

industryHighlights.text: 暑期档预热，《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》关注度攀升
industryHighlights.en: Summer pre-heat: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' gains traction.

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续领跑本周剧集话题
industryHighlights.en: 'House of the Dragon' continues to dominate weekly series buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》入围本周趋势，动画IP热度不减
industryHighlights.en: 'Moana: Set Sail' trends this week, animated IP remains hot.
